privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of two Configuration Items (CIs) from scratch in the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus CMDB. Verified the expected names ('Payroll Service' and 'Payroll-DB-01'), expected CI types ('Business Service' and 'Server'), and required relationship ('Depends On') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Noted that while export_result.sh extracts the CI types from the database, the local verifier.py script only evaluates the CI names and relationship graph, ignoring the expected CI type compliance.
